name: Briarcliff Woods Park
description: Briarcliff Woods Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Montgomery, IL. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Civic Center Park
description: Two pickleball courts are located at Civic Center Park in Oswego, IL.  These courts have permanent lines and nets and feature Sport Court's athletic surface, which is much safer and easier on the body than concrete or asphalt.  To learn more about Sport Court's surface, visit www.courtofsport.com

name: Rotary Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rotary Park in Yorkville, IL! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
